data.title: The whale with a 100% win rate increased its short position to 666 BTC, with a total holding of $74.43 million.
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Aunt Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), half an hour ago, the counterparty of the "100% winning whale" had increased its BTC short position to 666 pieces. The current position size is about US$74.43 million, the opening price was US$110,004.1, and the current floating loss is about US$1.17 million.

data.title: Bitcoin is trading at a 30% discount relative to Nasdaq fair value
data.description:
Bitcoin is currently trading at a roughly 30% discount compared to its Nasdaq 100-implied fair value. While any high-conviction Bitcoiner already knows how cheap the asset is right now, this ratio highlights the knock-down BTC price in proportion. And it’s a divergence that has historically implied a deep undervaluation
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-is-trading-at-a-30-discount-relative-to-nasdaq-fair-value/

data.title: BNB Drops Below 1,110 USDT with a 0.04% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 25, 2025, 15:06 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 1,110 USDT and is now trading at 1,108.569946 USDT, with a narrowed 0.04% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Smart money transferred 10,000 GIGGLE to Binance, with a floating profit of approximately $1.71 million
data.description: According to crypto analyst Aunt Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), the address 0x618…bfc6e transferred all 10,000 GIGGLE tokens it had accumulated between September 27 and October 13 to Binance five hours ago. If sold at the current price, the tokens would have generated a profit of approximately $1.71 million, a 376% return on investment. Furthermore, the address has accumulated approximately $96,000 in profits on Hakimi.

data.title: UN cybercrime treaty to be signed in Hanoi aimed to end the Southeast Asia scam compound
data.description:
Approximately 60 countries are set to execute a significant UN cybercrime treaty in Hanoi, Vietnam, this weekend. The treaty states that the goal is to combat crimes that cost the world economy trillions of dollars every year. According to the UN, the Cybercrime Convention is a powerful, legally binding instrument to strengthen our collective defenses […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/un-cybercrime-treaty-to-be-signed-in-hanoi/

data.title: Whale Increases Short Position Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, an on-chain analyst known as Ai Yi has reported that a prominent trader, referred to as the '100% Win Rate Whale,' has recently increased their short position by 666 BTC. This brings the total position to approximately $74.43 million, with an average opening price of $110,004.1 per Bitcoin. Currently, the position is experiencing an unrealized loss of $1.17 million.

data.title: Why Elon Musk’s SpaceX transferred $133M in Bitcoin
data.description:
Elon Musk’s SpaceX has moved over 133 million dollars worth of Bitcoin. The firm transferred a total of 1,215 BTC to two separate, new wallets. The move follows other recent on-chain activity after a three-year lull
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/why-elon-musks-spacex-transferred-133m-in-bitcoin/

data.title: U.S. stablecoin payment usage surges 70%, with annual volume expected to reach $122 billion
data.description: Since the US passed its first regulatory bill targeting the cryptocurrency stablecoin sector in July, the use of stablecoins by consumers and businesses for real-world payments has increased significantly. Blockchain data firm Artemis indicates that by August 2025, total stablecoin transactions for goods, services, and transfers will exceed $10 billion, a 70% increase from $6 billion in February of this year and double the amount from the same period last year. Researchers estimate that if the current growth rate continues, annual stablecoin payments could reach $122 billion. (Bloomberg)
